Name: Forretress ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 5 Basic [G] Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck. If you searched your deck in this way, this Pokémon is Knocked Out.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Meowscarada ex
Ability-Effect: You must discard a Basic [G] Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may put 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 120 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Wo-Chien ex
Effects: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon for each Prize card your opponent has taken. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Skeledirge ex
Effects: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.
This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Chi-Yu ex
Effects: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.
Choose up to 3 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a Basic [R] Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Quaquaval ex
Effects: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon. )
Put 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Chien-Pao ex
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may search your deck for up to 2 Basic [W] Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: You may discard any amount of [W] Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Bellibolt ex
Effects: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
You may discard 2 [L] Energy from this Pokémon to make your opponent's Active Pokémon Paralyzed.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Slowking ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
You may search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Dedenne ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: Move all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tinkaton ex
Effects: This attack does 30 damage for each card in your hand.
This attack's damage isn’t affected by any effects on your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Lycanroc ex
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if it is Knocked Out), put 10 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Annihilape ex
Effects: Put up to 12 damage counters on this Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter you placed in this way.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Ting-Lu ex
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Pokémon in play that have any damage counters on them have no Abilities, except for Pokémon ex.
Effects: Put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Paldean Clodsire ex
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if a Stadium is in play, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Poisoned.
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Copperajah ex
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Noivern ex
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.
During your opponent's next turn, they can’t play any Special Energy or Stadium cards from their hand.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Squawkabilly ex
Ability-Effect: Once during your first turn, you may discard your hand and draw 6 cards. You can't use more than 1 Squawk and Seize Ability during your turn.
Effects: Attach up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Boss's Orders
Description: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

Name: Clavell
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Pokémon with 120 HP or less, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Dendra
Description: Put a card from your hand on the bottom of your deck. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. (If you have no other cards in your hand, you can't use this card. )

Name: Falkner
Description: Draw 2 cards. If you have a Stadium in play, draw 2 more cards.

Name: Giacomo
Description: Discard a Special Energy from each of your opponent's Pokémon.

Name: Grusha
Description: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If none of your Pokémon have any Energy attached, draw cards until you have 7 cards in your hand instead.

Name: Iono
Description: Each player shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If either player put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, each player draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.

Name: Saguaro
Description: Choose up to 2 of your Pokémon and heal 50 damage from each of them.

Name: Super Rod
Description: Shuffle up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon and basic Energy cards from your discard pile back into your deck.

Name: Superior Energy Retrieval
Description: Discard 2 cards from your hand. (If you can't discard 2 cards, you can't play this card. ) Put 4 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand. (You can't choose a card you discarded with the effect of this card. )
